title: From General to Governor: Putin Pushes a ‘New Elite’ of War Veterans
summary_full: The popular leader of a region bordering Ukraine is replaced by a military commander as President Vladimir V. Putin looks to reward those who fought in his war.
summary_public: The popular leader of a region bordering Ukraine is replaced by a military commander as President Vladimir V. Putin looks to reward those who fought in his war.
